fields.name: Performance Throttles
fields.definition:
Split-screen throttle settings should be more aggresive than non-local co-op settings
block index 0:	default non split screen
block index 1: two way split screen
block index 2: three way split screen
block index 3: four way split screen
block index 4: one additional non-local player
block index 5: two additional non-local players
block index 6: three additional non-local players

fields.name: effect lod distance scale{effect lod limit}
object fade modifier#scales down the distances at which objects first imposter and then fade out
object lighting time limit:s 0=0.001s#per frame time limit to spend sampling new lighting radiosity
IO fade modifier#scales down the distances at which IOs imposter
max forward dynamic lights{max gpu dynamic lights}#will quickly fade gpu lights when we try to render more than this many:0 = off
forward dynamic light fade distance scale{gpu light fade distance scale}#scales the size used for distance-fade (set smaller to make it fade earlier)
max screenspace dynamic lights#will quickly fade screenspace lights when we try to render more than this many:0 = off
screenspace light fade distance scale#scales the size used for distance-fade (set smaller to make it fade earlier)
max effect lights (screenspace)#limits the number of effect lights we allow to be active at a time (eg. needler needles lighting up objects):0 = off
shadow quality lod#scales resolution of object shadows:[0.0 to 1.0]
floating shadow quality lod#scales resolution of floating shadow:[0.0 to 1.0], 0 = off
anisotropy level: less than 1.0 - off, equals 1.0 - 4x, larger than 1.0 - 8x

options: disable first person depth of field
disable instance occlusion queries#WARNING Will likely hurt perf on most maps
